g.text: (claim: Socrates agreed to obey Athenian laws)

g.title: claim_1151e043
g.text: Socrates agreed to obey Athenian laws
Socrates enters an implied agreement to obey the laws of
Athens or persuade the city otherwise.

g.text: A person must never intentionally do wrong.

g.text: If Socrates escapes from prison, he does wrong.

g.title: claim_838eb134
g.text: If Socrates escapes from prison against the will of Athens,

g.text: Socrates remains in Athens throughout his life with
